headline: Welcome to AI-Prowler v8.0.0
body:
Your Personal Agentic AI Knowledge Base for Claude.

AI-Prowler™ Home v8.0.0 for Windows 11 — index your local documents and put 85 AI-powered tools at Claude’s fingertips, on desktop, web, and mobile.

★ Index local and OneDrive documents from any folder — 65+ file formats supported including scanned PDFs and images with full OCR text extraction.

★ ChromaDB vector database with semantic search — Claude queries intelligently across 10,000+ files with provenance-aware results.

★ 85 MCP tools across 12 categories: Agentic RAG, Code Tools, Self-Learning, Action Tools, Email, SMS, Scheduling, Dev Tools, Indexing, Job Tracking, Analysis, and Health checks.

★ Code Tools — Claude can create, edit, back up, and restore files in pre-authorized directories with a double-lock security model and per-session circuit breaker.

★ Self-Learning system — Claude records business lessons, corrections, and insights into a persistent knowledge base and applies them automatically in future sessions.

★ Connect via Claude Desktop (local/stdio) or Claude.ai and the Claude mobile app — one-click subscription, one-click tunnel setup, auto Connect Claude.ai button.

★ AI-Prowler™ Home is free for desktop use with Claude Desktop.

★ AI-Prowler™ Mobile Access — subscribe from the Settings tab for $10/month (Personal) or $20/month (Business). Tunnel provisioned automatically — no Cloudflare account needed.

★ AI-Prowler™ Business — multi-user server mode with role-based access, per-user document isolation, and admin panel.

Get started: click the Index Docs tab to add your first folder.
footer: AI-Prowler v8.0.0 — Free for personal desktop use
